briefdescription.para: The origin of an actor, within its parent's area.
The x origin of an actor, within its parent's area.
The y origin of an actor, within its parent's area.
The z origin of an actor, within its parent's area.
The anchor-point of an actor.
The x anchor-point of an actor.
The y anchor-point of an actor.
The z anchor-point of an actor.
The size of an actor.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "size", type Property::VECTOR3 or Property::VECTOR2, animatable / constraint-input
Only Property::VECTOR3 can be animated or used as constraint-input @SINCE_1_0.0

briefdescription.para: The width of an actor.
The height of an actor.
The depth of an actor.
The position of an actor.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "position", type Property::VECTOR3 or Property::VECTOR2, animatable / constraint-input
Only Property::VECTOR3 can be animated or used as constraint-input @SINCE_1_0.0

briefdescription.para: The x position of an actor.
The y position of an actor.
The z position of an actor.
The world position of an actor.
The x world position of an actor.
The y world position of an actor.
The z world position of an actor.
The orientation of an actor.
The world orientation of an actor.
The scale factor applied to an actor.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "scale", type Property::VECTOR3 or Property::FLOAT, animatable / constraint-input
Only Property::VECTOR3 can be animated or used as constraint-input @SINCE_1_0.0

briefdescription.para: The x scale factor applied to an actor.
The y scale factor applied to an actor.
The x scale factor applied to an actor.
The world scale factor applied to an actor.
The visibility flag of an actor.
The color of an actor.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "color", type Property::VECTOR4 or Property::VECTOR3, animatable / constraint-input
The alpha value will be 1.0f if a Vector3 type value is set. @SINCE_1_0.0

briefdescription.para: The red component of an actor's color.
The green component of an actor's color.
The blue component of an actor's color.
The alpha component of an actor's color.
The world color of an actor.
The world matrix of an actor.
The name of an actor.
The flag whether an actor should emit touch or hover signals.
The flag whether an actor should receive a notification when touch or hover motion events leave. In the case of the hover event, when the hover event enters the actor, it will receive started state.
The flag whether a child actor inherits it's parent's orientation.
The flag whether a child actor inherits it's parent's scale.
The color mode of an actor.
The draw mode of an actor.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "drawMode", type DrawMode::Type (Property::INTEGER) or Property::STRING. @SINCE_1_0.0
DrawMode::OVERLAY_2D and CLIPPING_MODE set to ClippingMode::CLIP_TO_BOUNDING_BOX cannot be used together. In this scenario the clipping is ignored.

briefdescription.para: The size mode factor of an actor.
The resize policy for the width of an actor.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "widthResizePolicy", type ResizePolicy::Type (Property::INTEGER) or Property::STRING. @SINCE_1_0.0
Actor::SetResizePolicy()

briefdescription.para: The resize policy for the height of an actor.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "heightResizePolicy", type ResizePolicy::Type (Property::INTEGER) or Property::STRING. @SINCE_1_0.0
Actor::SetResizePolicy()

briefdescription.para: The size scale policy of an actor.
The flag to determine the width dependent on the height.
The flag to determine the height dependent on the width.
The padding of an actor for use in layout.
The minimum size an actor can be assigned in size negotiation.
The maximum size an actor can be assigned in size negotiation.
The flag whether a child actor inherits it's parent's position.
The clipping mode of an actor.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "clippingMode", type ClippingMode::Type (Property::INTEGER) or Property::STRING. @SINCE_1_2_5
ClippingMode::Type for supported values.
ClippingMode::CLIP_TO_BOUNDING_BOX and DRAW_MODE set to DrawMode::OVERLAY_2D cannot be used together. In this scenario the clipping is ignored.

briefdescription.para: The direction of the layout.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "layoutDirection", type LayoutDirection::Type (Property::INTEGER) or Property::STRING. @SINCE_1_2.60
LayoutDirection::Type for supported values.

briefdescription.para: Determines whether child actors inherit the layout direction from a parent.
The opacity of the actor.
Returns the screen position of the Actor.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "screenPosition", type Property::VECTOR2. Read-only
Automatically detects 2D or 3D calculation based on actor context and ancestor layers.
For 2D: Uses optimized calculation with orthographic projection (Z=0, only Z-axis rotation considered).
For 3D: Uses full 3D projection with perspective and camera rotation.
The last known frame is used for the calculation. May not match a position value just set. @SINCE_1_9.17

briefdescription.para: Determines whether the pivot should be used to determine the position of the actor.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "positionUsesPivot", type Property::BOOLEAN.
This is true by default.
If false, then the top-left of the actor is used for the position.
Setting this to false will allow scaling or rotation around the anchor-point without affecting the actor's position. @SINCE_1_9.17

briefdescription.para: Returns whether the actor is culled or not.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "culled", type Property::BOOLEAN. Read-only
True means that the actor is out of the view frustum. @SINCE_1_9.17

briefdescription.para: The unique ID of the actor.
The current depth in the hierarchy of the actor.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "hierarchyDepth", type Property::INTEGER. Read-only
The value is -1 if actor is not in the hierarchy. @SINCE_1_9.17

briefdescription.para: The flag whether an actor is the root actor, which is owned by the Scene.
The flag whether the actor is of class Dali::Layer.
The flag whether the actor is connected to the Scene. When an actor is connected, it will be directly or indirectly parented to the root Actor.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "connectedToScene", type Property::BOOLEAN. Read-only
The root Actor is provided automatically by the Scene, and is always considered to be connected. @SINCE_1_9.17

briefdescription.para: The flag whether the actor should be focusable by keyboard navigation.
Sets the update area hint of the actor.

detaileddescription.para:
Name "updateAreaHint", type Property::VECTOR4 (x, y, width, height).
Overrides the area - the position and the size - used for the actor damaged area calculation. Affected by the actor model view matrix. The position is relative to the center of the actor and it is also the center of the damaged area. @SINCE_2_1.33

briefdescription.para: Enumeration for instance of properties belonging to the Actor class. @SINCE_1_0.0.
Enumeration for the instance of properties belonging to the Actor class. @SINCE_1_0.0.
